Terms & Conditions

Welcome to UAE IPTV BOX.

By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and conditions outlined below. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our website.

1. Use of Website

This website provides information about our products and services, including TV boxes and IPTV subscription services. The content is for general informational purposes only.

2. Products & Services

We offer both physical products (TV boxes) and digital services (IPTV subscriptions). Product descriptions, pricing, and availability are subject to change without notice.

3. Pricing

Prices displayed on the website are provided for informational purposes. Final pricing, promotions, or discounts may be confirmed during direct communication.

4. Orders & Purchases

Purchases are not completed directly through this website. Customers are redirected to our official WhatsApp channel to finalize orders and payment arrangements.

5. Payments

Payments are arranged via WhatsApp communication. We offer Cash on Delivery (COD) and other mutually agreed payment options.

6. Refund Policy

Refunds are considered only if a product has a verified defect or problem. Refund eligibility is determined after assessment. Digital services may not be refundable once activated unless otherwise agreed.

7. Limitation of Liability

UAE IPTV BOX strives to provide reliable products, services, and accurate website information. However, we shall not be held liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products, services, or website.

8. External Communication Platforms

Our website may redirect users to WhatsApp for communication. Any data shared through WhatsApp is governed by WhatsApp’s own policies.

9. Intellectual Property

All website content, including text, images, logos, and design elements, belongs to UAE IPTV BOX and may not be copied, reproduced, or used without permission.

10. Age Requirement

You must be at least 18 years old to use our services or make purchases.

11. Governing Law

These Terms & Conditions are governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates (UAE).

12. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms & Conditions at any time. Updates will be posted on this page.

13. Contact Information

WhatsApp: 0502368942

Email: uaeiptvbox@gmail.com

offers IPTV boxes and TV subscriptions with global access, crystal-clear streaming, and 24/7 expert support-your gateway to non-stop entertainment.
